private static final String[] ERROR_CARDS = {
        ERROR_VISA,
        ERROR_SHORT_VISA,
        ERROR_AMEX,
        ERROR_MASTERCARD,
        ERROR_DISCOVER,
        ERROR_DISCOVER65,
        ERROR_DINERS,
        ERROR_VPAY,
        "",
        "12345678901", // too short (11)
        "12345678901234567890", // too long (20)
        "4417123456789112", // invalid check digit
    };

private static final String[] VALID_CARDS = {
        VALID_VISA,
        VALID_SHORT_VISA,
        VALID_AMEX,
        VALID_MASTERCARD,
        VALID_DISCOVER,
        VALID_DISCOVER65,
        VALID_DINERS,
